scripts.test: bun run test:js && bun run test:rust
scripts.test:js: bun run --filter @copilotchat/shared test:coverage && bun run --filter @copilotchat/bridge test:coverage && bun run --filter @copilotchat/web test:coverage && bun run --filter @dhruv2mars/copilotchat test:coverage
scripts.build:js: bun run --filter @copilotchat/shared build && bun run --filter @copilotchat/bridge build && bun run --filter @copilotchat/web build && bun run --filter @dhruv2mars/copilotchat build
scripts.check: bun run check:js && cargo fmt --all --check && cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings
scripts.check:js: bun run --filter @copilotchat/shared check && bun run --filter @copilotchat/bridge check && bun run --filter @copilotchat/web check && bun run --filter @dhruv2mars/copilotchat check
